enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder about a frustrating day in which his computer kept crashing while he was working on some kind of written document or book. He also recorded a video that uploaded to YouTube without audio, so he deleted it and is now re-recording. He ends by mentioning he plans to work on something the next day when the lighting is better.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: deeply frustrated by repeated crashes disrupting his work and recording
determined to keep re-recording and re-trying despite ongoing failures

transcript.text: Hello, I'm having a really weird day. My computer's not working right. I thought before maybe it was my computer's not working right. I was trying to put Livia up. I had some problems with Livia. I made the menu, the template, and all the links in the template.

I had the books, and then all the chapters, 1 through 60, and then I placed them on, and then I noticed that it wasn't 1 through 60, and each chapter, it started at random numbers, 56, 65, whatever, and then it went up from there, so I had to manually change every single link, and all the chapters on my house changed.
And then, I mean, all the books, I had to change batch, edit all of the, to say what book it was, because I put the wrong one.
And then, yeah, I put Livia up. You can see it on my website, but now my computer all of a sudden crashed.
Like, no matter what I do, I restarted my computer, and it just crashes when I opened up Dreamweaver.
I opened up a tiny little page. All it was was just one thing, and I took out the paragraphs on it, you know, on the menu, and then it crashed Dreamweaver.
So then I rebooted Dreamweaver, and opened Living, and then it opened, pasted the other, the menu on the other page, and then it crashes Dreamweaver, so.

But my computer wasn't working, because, anyway, because I, I recorded a video today, and, um, and then I uploaded it, and then, uh, and then I noticed that there wasn't any sound on YouTube, and then I tried to play the video on my computer, and then the video wouldn't even play.
So I had to, like, there was no, like, there was no, like, you could see the time going, but it was just me like this.
So, I just deleted the video, and now I'm recording another video.
And, um, let's see if this goes up, and, uh, let's see if, yeah, Dreamweaver, let's see if Dreamweaver is frozen.
Oh, look, Dreamweaver came back to life.
Um, cool.
So, yeah, I'm trying to, um, if you go to my living right now on my menu, you'll see it all spread out, and I was just trying to condense it.
So, we'll see if I can paste it back on living, and then I mentioned my links are broken, but, yeah, my computer crashed on Dreamweaver, so,
I hope if I can paste this back on the living, and we'll see if I can paste, um, books outside of living and back in,
If I could do more batch editing for the links, but, my computer's been crashing every time I opened Dreamweaver, so,
Let's see if this video recorded, and will work, and it has any sound.
Really weird.
So, that's what I've been doing, just fighting my computer about living.
Living is 3,200 pages, so maybe I have something to do with it.
But, there are other pages that are that big on my website, but don't even know those kinds of problems.
So, tomorrow, I'll try to put the lights up in my room.
Today, my computer's gonna have to be over here.
Alright, peace out.
